originalTitle: Halo: Campaign Evolved | New Missions Trailer | Operation: Meteorite
content: Before the events of Halo: Combat Evolved, the Master Chief and Sgt Johnson take part in Operation: Meteorite, in which they infiltrate a mysterious Covenant ship on a clandestine assignment. Experience their fight behind enemy lines in the form of three all-new bonus missions included in Halo: Campaign Evolved. Halo: Campaign Evolved is coming to Xbox Series X|S, PC, and PlayStation 5 on July 28. Pre-order the Premium Edition or Collector’s Edition today and get up to 5 days early access beginning July 23, 2026. chineseContent: 在《光环：战斗进化》事件发生之前，士官长和约翰逊中士参加了“陨石行动”，他们潜入一艘神秘的星盟飞船执行秘密任务。通过光环：战役进化中包含的三个全新奖励任务的形式体验他们的敌后战斗。 《光环：战役进化》将于 7 月 28 日登陆 Xbox Series X|S、PC 和 PlayStation 5。立即预订高级版或收藏版，即可从 2026 年 7 月 23 日起提前 5 天体验。立即预订！ http://aka.ms/HCEBuyNow 了解更多：http://aka.ms/HCENew #Halo #Xbox #HaloCE __________________________________________ 关注 #Halo 了解最新更新： - Instagram：https://instagram.com/Halo - TikTok：https://www.tiktok.com/@halo - Facebook：https://facebook.com/Halo - Twitch：https://twitch.tv/Halo - Discord：https://discord.gg/Halo - X/Twitter：https://twitter.com/halo - 主题：https://threads.com/@halo - Bluesky：https://bsky.app/profile/halo.gg - 网站：https://halowaypoint.com Halo 支持 - 网站：https://aka.ms/HaloSupport - X/Twitter：https://twitter.com/HaloSupport
